title: It's Game Day
description: Gear up for a blast with exciting games. Don your favorite team gear and join the fun!

title: Home for the Holidays
description: Gather with loved ones, snuggle up, and let the warmth of the season fill your heart!

title: Mid Century Vibes
description: Mid-Century meets Palm Springs. Step back in time with retro style and groovy beats!

title: Paint the Town Red
description: A Night Out in Vibrant Red! Dress to Dazzle!

title: Amore
description: An evening of Italian-inspired romance, food, and dancing. Amore!

title: Spring Fling
description: Welcome spring with a night of music, dancing, and celebration!

title: Season Finale
description: Close out an amazing season with a grand celebration!
